_publications._publicationTitle: Pilot study of the effectiveness of a telehealth group for improving peer relationships for adolescents with neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: All subscales on the SRS-2 were significantly better at post-test with medium effect sizes
details: All SRS-2 subscales showed significant improvement at post-test with medium effect sizes, with 14 participants having difficulty at pre-test (T-score > 60)
